name: Data Visualization Suite
requirements: Rich Canvas / Shader v2 (for Braille/Quad plotting)

userStory.iWant: high-density charts and sparklines in my terminal
userStory.soThat: I can monitor system health and metrics with high visual fidelity.

acceptanceCriteria: sparkline() renders a compact inline trend graph
barChart() supports grouped/stacked bars with auto-scaling
scatterPlot() uses Braille pixels for high-resolution point distribution
All charts support auto-theming via the Token Graph
backwardCompatibility: New standalone components; zero impact on existing components.

testPlan.goldenPath: Render a barChart with 5 data points. Assert that the bars are scaled correctly to the provided width/height and that colors match the threshold rules.
testPlan.fuzzStress: Render a 100,000-point scatter plot and measure the Braille-mapping performance.
failureCases: Divide by zero in scaling logic

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(D) where D is data points
